concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 论文构建了加权求和模型，将犯罪数量、严重程度、受害人数等因子加权得到基础犯罪评分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The simplest version of our model generates a crime rating of 4.4 for the general metropolitan area of My City, and when additional factors are considered, the crime rating reaches 17.47.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 为了比较不同城市，对人口等指标进行了归一化处理，例如将犯罪数量除以人口。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: if Minneapolis had the same population as your city, there would be approximately 149 crimes per day.

concepts_used.title: 熵权法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文考虑了犯罪在区域间的均匀性，使用类似熵的概念衡量犯罪分布，作为评分因子。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: These new factors included the uniformity of crime distribution, the percent of people arrested for their crimes, and the locations of the crimes with respect to residential areas.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过比较基础评分和考虑额外因素后的评分，展示了模型对因子变化的敏感性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The simplest version of our model generates a crime rating of 4.4 ... and when additional factors are considered, the crime rating reaches 17.47.

concepts_used.title: 模型对比的可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 论文将My City的评分与底特律、明尼阿波利斯等真实城市对比，通过数值比较展示模型有效性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Downtown Detroit ... received a basic score of 37.7 ... Minneapolis ... received a basic score of 2.6 ... My City ... 4.4.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出了6条假设，每条都附有合理性论证，例如假设未被提及的beat不存在。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Beats that are not referred to in the given spreadsheet do not exist. Justification: The mean number of crimes in any given beat was calculated to be 40...

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言、定义假设、模型描述、结果、结论。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1 – Introduction ... 2 – Definitions, Assumptions, Justifications, and Variables ... 3 – Model Description

concepts_used.title: Excel 数据透视
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用Excel和Java编程快速分析犯罪数据，计算评分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we utilized Microsoft Excel and Java programming to quickly analyze the data and yield results in a timely manner.
